results.text: Dust Storm: Guile disadvantage. Test Fortitude DR12 or take d4 damage and become Fatigued.
Echoes of the Forge: Mines hum with rhythmic creation. Calming presence.
Seismic Tremors: Test Swift DR12 to avoid falling rocks or crevasses.
Cleansing Breeze: Sulphur gas invigorates. +2 to Fortitude Tests for 1 hour.
Unstable Machinery: Malfunctioning gears. Test Swift DR12 or take d6 damage.
Lava Flow: Sudden eruption. Test Swift DR14 or take 2d6 fire damage.
